import time
from prometheus_client import Histogram

PROCESS_LATENCY = Histogram("process_latency_seconds", "Time to process request")

def handle_request(request_data: dict) -> dict:
    start = time.monotonic()
    db = connect_to_database()
    cache = warm_cache(db)
    result = process(request_data, db, cache)
    db.close()
    elapsed = time.monotonic() - start
    PROCESS_LATENCY.observe(elapsed)
    return result

def process(data: dict, db, cache) -> dict:
    return {"status": "ok"}

def connect_to_database():
    return "db_connection"

def warm_cache(db):
    return "cache"

def train_model(dataset_path: str):
    start = time.perf_counter()
    data = load_dataset(dataset_path)
    data = preprocess(data)
    split = train_test_split(data)
    model = fit_model(split)
    metrics = evaluate(model, split)
    elapsed = time.perf_counter() - start
    PROCESS_LATENCY.observe(elapsed)
    return model

def load_dataset(path: str):
    return []

def preprocess(data):
    return data

def train_test_split(data):
    return data

def fit_model(split):
    return "model"

def evaluate(model, split):
    return {}
